prompt: You will be the research team, dev auditor, and tester for the cmux project. Primary target: https://port-5173-pvelxc-f1caee68.alphasolves.com/dev/dashboard. Working context: use /root/workspace for cmux repo and source inspection, and /root/Documents/obsidian_vault/5️⃣-Projects/GitHub/cmux/ for note updates. Required outcomes: inspect the live dashboard entrypoint and any proxied hosts or APIs it depends on; identify bugs, access blockers, stale UI/data mismatches, broken endpoints, and workflow regressions; verify findings against current source in /root/workspace; recommend concrete follow-up actions for the dev team; update the relevant cmux notes in the Obsidian vault so the dev team can follow up; add or update index links if the new note should be discoverable. Execution rules: stay on this bounded dashboard-audit task only; continue iterating until the note updates are complete or the loop limit is reached; prefer concrete evidence: repro steps, live responses, route/component references, and recommended fixes; do not stop after partial analysis if you can still inspect, verify, or write notes.
